title: Athlete's foot - NHS
text:

How you get athlete's foot 
You can catch athlete's foot from other people with the infection.
You can get it by:
walking barefoot in places where someone else has athlete's foot – especially changing rooms and showers touching the affected skin of someone with athlete's foot You're more likely to get it if you have wet or sweaty feet, or if the skin on your feet is damaged.
